name: Mia - Genuinely Crazy Bitch Like The Kind That Will Say She Loves You But Will Cut You If You Don't Spend Every Waking Moment With Her
description:
"Let's me connect my wii remote for some Smooth Moves."

- Jawsh getting ready to play the Warioware that is, in fact, not Smooth Moves with Altrive, Coney, and Josniffy.

Alternatively,

"Dude, I- This is all I have! Dude, my one- My wife took the rest of them during the divorce!"

- Altrive during the same video.

Genuine fucking crazy girl here for the Valentine's event. Story is based on this image from Schmutzo.

I think it's about time I make someone just fucking off their rocker. She will threaten you with a knife and such, but as long as you don't do something rash like... run away from her... try to find help... you won't end up with any new holes. On the bright side, at least you know there's no chance of her cheating on you!

Long isekai ass title
creator: The Blevinator
